posts.text:
Kobe of Ozarks


OWOLABI NURUDEEN ALABI (@owolabina)

What can you say about Luka Magic tonight UNC?



— https://nitter.net/owolabina/status/2033023135948140807#m

2 things can be true. Luka made a play and Jones blew coverage


CoolHandMe (@CoolHandMe33)

This is what people do when they hate Luka. They don’t give him the credit they blame the double team.



— https://nitter.net/CoolHandMe33/status/2033023680599802003#m

Not 2nite


Navin R. Johnson (@nrjoptigrab)

Nuggets are better.



— https://nitter.net/nrjoptigrab/status/2033026880295809522#m

Baby steps


Vega Vision ⭐️ (@Willie_esco818)

Just grab your blocked shot, though 😂



— https://nitter.net/Willie_esco818/status/2033026975401390350#m
Lakers will take this D.A everyday and twice on Sunday. The effort was there and consistent 👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾
Jones has Brown coming 2 his outside 2 double and he gives Luka his inside on gm winning shot. Lakers made some unbelievable plays dwn the stretch tho.

AAAAAAANDDDDDDD


Jason Williams (@Metalchondria)

You’re not a Lakers fan, you’re a LeBron fan. Stop lying to the audience.



— https://nitter.net/Metalchondria/status/2033018506669863286#m
Kobe of the Ozarks with an ESPY moment 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
That’s why you can’t double Yoke. He’ll fine open shooter and it’s just a matter IF* he can knock it dwn.
Any1 gonna say  anything about that loose 🏀 hustle by Bron? Maybe im the only 1 that saw it. Gr8 def by Smart 2 give Lakers a 1 pt lead.
